【小说世界，纯属虚构，切勿较真】
苏阳高穷帅，穿衣显瘦，脱衣有肉，不想竟入了京圈大小姐的眼。
京圈大小姐起初冷冰冰，后来黏人精，恨不得时时贴在他身上。
苏阳只想躲，只因她是自己消失多年的老婆。
沈幼卿眼神哀伤祈求：“阿阳别走，我哪里不好，我改，行不？” 　　　　
苏阳冷着脸：“你钱太多，我高攀不起。”
沈幼卿撒娇：“都给你，都给你，以后你养我。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8872b496d821e894cb9a17cf7bc92801","author":"无良神棍","author_id":"","book_id":"7388790363281968152","book_name":"惊！小保安让女总直呼过瘾","book_short_name":"暗夜护世","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389116379678376510","read_count":"21619","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2789360"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"1364","tags":"都市日常,都市,单女主,大小姐,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21bad17f29ab2d4838cb77d78eed75b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303580&x-signature=cCy6bhc3Y28PJcxxQe79Y4M%2FOnQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4195381587225380","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"207"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025940D63E390A33132535C97B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forward
